subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever been mighty over whatsoever He willeth, and shall ever remain the All-Dominating [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقتدرا علی ما اراد و لایزال یکون مهیمنا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
